user: Hi team! I just wanted to say a huge thank you for the recent update; the product is working beautifully. I noticed a small issue with the custom serializer for polymorphic JSON where it occasionally misses the discriminator field, but it’s a minor quirk. Thanks for all the great work you do!

The iOS app takes about 15 seconds to launch on an iPhone 12 when the cache is cleared. During this period, the splash screen remains static before the main view controller loads. This delay occurs consistently across different network conditions. Please investigate potential initialization bottlenecks during the cold start phase.

Hi there! I just wanted to say a huge thank you for the seamless update on the certificate rotation. I was worried about the TLS pinning breaking our connections, but everything went smoothly without any downtime. Your documentation was super clear, and the support team was incredibly helpful when I had a quick question. Really appreciate the smooth experience!

Hi team, just wanted to say thank you for the amazing SDK! I’m currently working with BillingClient and was wondering if there’s a specific way to check its connection state before starting a purchase flow. The documentation is great, but I couldn't find a direct method for this. Thanks again for building such a reliable product!

My app is crashing repeatedly because of an infinite recomposition loop in Jetpack Compose, and it’s absolutely ridiculous. I’ve tried using LaunchedEffect and remember, but nothing stops the state from changing endlessly. This is blocking my entire release, please fix this immediately because I’m losing my sanity here.

This cold start issue is absolutely unacceptable. My app takes over 15 seconds to load on iOS, which is way worse than before. I’m losing customers because of this terrible performance and need a fix immediately.

Hey team! Just wanted to say thanks for adding the progress bar for large file downloads—it’s a huge quality of life improvement. Previously, it was a bit nerve-wracking wondering if the connection had dropped, but now I can see exactly how much is left. Really appreciate the smooth user experience you guys keep delivering. Keep up the great work!

Hi there! Just wanted to say thank you for the amazing app, it’s been super helpful for my workflow. I really love the new dark theme design, but I noticed that the color accents aren’t applying correctly on my end. Everything else looks great, so just a heads up in case you want to fix it. Keep up the good work!

This is ridiculous, I just bought a new phone and the fingerprint scanner refuses to register my prints. I’ve already tried cleaning the sensor and re-adding my fingers multiple times, but it keeps rejecting them. I don’t have time to set up a password every single time I unlock my device, this is a major usability issue. Please fix this ASAP or tell me exactly what I’m doing wrong.

I'm absolutely fed up with this. The library is crashing in release builds because the ProGuard rules are completely missing or wrong. I've wasted two days trying to figure out why classes are being stripped, and there's no documentation on what needs to be kept. Please add the correct consumer rules to the AAR artifact so I don't have to guess anymore. This is unacceptable for a production dependency.
